creator: dls@laser.caltech.edu
text:
Same as for kern PR# 4328, dated 1997-08-17, using Intel
EtherExpress Pro 100B.

Fix: 

See kern PR# 4328.
How-To-Repeat: Install system on a 10+MBPS network; ftp to a known, uncongested
site and transfer a large file.  Use etherfind or snoop to observe packet
sizes and transfer rate.  I used the default MTU of 1500.
